content_body:
Did you know? Colorado isn't the only place to experience a luxury cabin. Blue Ridge, GA, located just 2 hours north of Atlanta, is an idyllic small town bursting with gorgeous cabins in a serene mountain setting. This begs the question: how do you discern which Blue Ridge luxury cabins are the absolute best? That's where we step in!

Cabin Rentals of Georgia specializes in a luxury portfolio so that you can rest assured that your vacation rental has all the amenities you seek. With a personal touch, our family business ensures that every detail has been thought of before, during, and after your stay.


Riverview Lodge

From activity recommendations to concierge services, our team is dedicated to providing the most relaxing and memorable Blue Ridge experience. So, we've collected a few of our top North Georgia luxury cabins, offering everything from secluded hot tubs to decked-out game rooms, so you can peruse all the information right at your fingertips!

Secluded Luxury Cabins in Blue Ridge for Serene Getaways

For those who want to unplug for a couple of days (not really, because all of our cabins have high-speed Wifi!), our secluded cabins are your answer for a private getaway. Still close to many of the activities Blue Ridge has to offer, these luxury cabins provide both proximity and privacy. Positioned in the national forest or atop scenic vistas, these cabins ensure a high level of exclusivity, surrounded by nature's magnificence.

Cohutta Sunset: Panoramic Splendor

For those who desire breathtaking mountain views, Cohutta Sunset is unmatched. It provides a perfect vantage point to gaze upon the majestic mountains and Cohutta Wilderness with 180 degree views. Enjoy its luxurious custom-built interiors, several indoor/outdoor fireplaces, pool table, 3 King suites, rock waterfall shower, and hot tub for a royal vacation.

Aska Escape Lodge: Elegance Among the Trees

Tucked among majestic pine trees in the Aska Adventure Area, Aska Escape Lodge epitomizes tranquility. This cabin offers elegant furnishings, an inviting outdoor hot tub, and a wraparound deck for peaceful moments surrounded by nature. It's a prime setting for those looking to unwind and rejuvenate. Enjoy s'mores by the outdoor fireplace; have fun in the game room complete with a pool table, arcade machine, and board games; and spend an afternoon at the nearby Lilly Pad Village—just a short walk away—for gem mining, fishing, and sweet treats!

Luxury Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge: A Haven of Natural Beauty

Since the Appalachian Mountains begin in the Blue Ridge area, you can only imagine the glorious views that abound in the area. However, the beauty is not just allocated to the outdoors; our luxury cabins continue the splendor indoors as well.

Above the Timberline: Defining Mountain Luxury

Above the Timberline presents awe-inspiring views of the Blue Ridge Mountains, and its amenities maximize its surroundings. Highlights include two stunning window walls, outdoor fire pit, outdoor fireplace with gas heaters, hot tub, and plenty of outdoor seating—perfect for enjoying the gorgeous views. Indoors, you can enjoy 4 King Suites, pool table, arcade machine, wine fridge, and more! No matter the season, Above the Timberline does not disappoint. 

Serendipity on Noontootla Creek: A Forest Hideaway

Envision a modern treehouse where you and your friends can enjoy an outdoor fireplace, conversational seating, a hot tub, and gorgeous mountain and creek views! Inside, Serendipity's expansive windows frame the panoramic views of North Georgia's forests and the Noontootla Creek below. Melding rustic charm with modern luxuries, this vacation rental includes a gourmet kitchen, 5 King Suites, expansive porches, a sun room, pool table, and more.

Indulge in Georgia's Luxury Cabins with Exceptional Amenities

Luxury cabins in Blue Ridge aren't just about stunning locales; they also offer exclusive amenities that elevate your stay. For those seeking the epitome of luxury, these two properties have everything you seek.

The Rivers Edge: Serenity on the Toccoa River

Experience tranquility at The Rivers Edge, where you can enjoy direct river access for an afternoon of tubing or a morning of fishing. This three-story cabin boasts a sitting room/library, three porches—with seating and a fire table on the main floor, hot tub, pool table, and so much more. Outside lies its most popular feature: an octagonal deck perched above the Toccoa River, complete with outdoor fireplace!

Experience Unmatched Luxury in North Georgia Cabin Rentals

Georgia is a treasure trove of luxurious cabin rentals catering to everyone's wish list. Whether a secluded sanctuary, mountain view paradise, or riverside refuge suit your fancy, our properties are sure to impress.

Each cabin provides a unique way to experience Georgia's grandeur, setting an idyllic backdrop for creating lasting memories. Make sure to secure your luxury cabin in advance so you can reserve the one that checks all the boxes! Prepare for an unparalleled getaway that melds the rustic charm of cabin living with modern flare.


Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary

Ultimately, it's not just about where you stay; it's about the experiences you'll create and the tranquility you'll find. These luxury cabins in Georgia offer more than just a place to rest your head—they are the gateway to reconnect with nature, rejuvenate your spirit, and return home feeling refreshed and inspired.

Reserve one of our luxury cabins online with the "Instant Quote" button or give our Blue Ridge vacation specialists a call at (706) 432-2140.
title: Discover The Top Luxury Cabins in Georgia
